name: perfect-freehand
when_to_use: 需要把原始 pointer 采样点变成自然、带压感锥形收尾的墨迹轮廓(画板/白板/签名的笔画几何)时用它:喂 points、拿回环绕轮廓顶点,自己渲染成 SVG path 或 canvas 填充。它是原语不是编辑器,须自配 canvas + pointer 采集;要现成签名板用 signature-pad,要草图几何用 roughjs。
why_valuable: 把离散 pointer 点变成自然变宽的墨迹轮廓需要非平凡的变宽多边形/样条算法(thinning、smoothing、taper、拐角处理),AI 徒手做出的是抖动的等宽折线、完全不像墨;perfect-freehand 是 Excalidraw/tldraw 背后的墨迹引擎,纯函数、零 DOM 足迹。

data_in.note: getStroke(points, options?) → number[][](环绕输入点的闭合多边形轮廓顶点),你把它转 SVG path 或用 Path2D 填充。点可为 [x,y] / [x,y,pressure] / {x,y,pressure?};无真实压力可开 simulatePressure 按速度模拟。

schema.points: Array<[number,number] | [number,number,number] | {x:number,y:number,pressure?:number}> —— 采样点;第三位/pressure 为可选压力 0..1

options?.size?: number —— 笔画基础直径,默认 16
options?.thinning?: number —— 压力对粗细的影响 -1..1,默认 0.5
options?.streamline?: number —— 输入点抖动平滑 0..1,默认 0.5
options?.simulatePressure?: boolean —— 无真实压力时按速度模拟,默认 true
options?.start?: { cap?: boolean, taper?: number|boolean } —— 起点锥形/端帽
options?.end?: { cap?: boolean, taper?: number|boolean } —— 终点锥形/端帽
options?.last?: boolean —— 是否作为已完成笔画处理

provides._note: headless-primitive:不渲染、无 L 级、无 carriers 矩阵;返回几何顶点由你渲染。
provides.outputs: getStroke → 环绕输入点的闭合多边形轮廓顶点 number[][],可直接转 SVG path 或 canvas fill。

api_surface.steps: getStrokePoints(points, options?) → StrokePoint[];getStrokeOutlinePoints(strokePoints, options?) → number[][](需要分步/自定义时用)

peer.note: 本条只产轮廓顶点 number[][];渲染与 pointer 事件采集由你自建。常规做法:pointerdown/move 收集点 → getStroke → 拼成 SVG path 的 d(官方推荐 quadratic-smooth 拼法)塞进 <path>,或用 Path2D 填到 canvas。渲染载体与回调由消费 AI 按原生接。

en.when_to_use: Use it when raw pointer samples must become a natural ink outline with pressure-sensitive width and tapered endings (stroke geometry for a drawing board, whiteboard, or signature): feed it points, receive surrounding outline vertices, then render them as an SVG path or filled canvas shape. It is a primitive, not an editor, so supply your own canvas and pointer capture. For a ready-made signature pad, use signature-pad; for sketch geometry, use roughjs.
en.why_valuable: Turning discrete pointer points into a naturally varying ink outline requires non-trivial variable-width polygon/spline work (thinning, smoothing, taper, and corner handling). AI-authored output is usually a jittery constant-width polyline that does not resemble ink. perfect-freehand is the ink engine behind Excalidraw/tldraw, with pure functions and no DOM footprint.

data_in.note: getStroke(points, options?) -> number[][] (vertices of a closed polygon surrounding the input points); convert it to an SVG path or fill it with Path2D. Points may be [x,y], [x,y,pressure], or {x,y,pressure?}. Without real pressure, enable simulatePressure to infer it from speed.

schema.points: Array<[number,number] | [number,number,number] | {x:number,y:number,pressure?:number}> -- sampled points; the third item/pressure is optional pressure 0..1

options?.thinning?: number -- pressure effect on width, -1..1; default 0.5
options?.simulatePressure?: boolean -- infer pressure from speed when real pressure is unavailable; default true
options?.start?: { cap?: boolean, taper?: number|boolean } -- start taper/cap
options?.end?: { cap?: boolean, taper?: number|boolean } -- end taper/cap
options?.last?: boolean -- whether to treat the stroke as complete

boot.note: 空 points 返回空数组(须先判空);要压感须在点里带第三位 pressure 或开 simulatePressure。default import 等价于 getStroke(default===getStroke)。

example._why: 钉死点可带第三位压力、options 用真实字段名 size/thinning/smoothing。

isolation.evidence: +esm 导出 default getStroke(Bn) 及 named {getStroke, getStrokeOutlinePoints, getStrokePoints}。dist/types:getStroke(points: (number[] | {x,y,pressure?})[], options?: StrokeOptions) => number[][](Vec2[] 轮廓多边形);StrokeOptions={size, thinning, smoothing, streamline, easing, simulatePressure, start:{cap,taper}, end:{cap,taper}, last}。+esm 隔离扫描:document.head/body=0、createElement('style')=0、insertRule=0、监听=0 —— 纯数值变换、无 DOM。headless-primitive:返回轮廓由你渲染(SVG path/canvas),天然 shadow-safe。
